message:
fix(tools): improve TTL clamping warnings and attachment serialization error logging

- macros/reservations: restructure TTL clamping to warn on both under-
  minimum (< 60s) and over-maximum (> 1 year) cases using if-let chains
  instead of is_some_and + unwrap_or
- messaging: log a tracing::warn with the actual error when attachment
  metadata serialization fails, instead of silently falling back to "[]"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
